data.content:
Here's my analysis of the legacy patterns found:

| # | Legacy Pattern | Modernization |
|---|---------------|---------------|
| 1 | `ToolsVersion` + XML namespace | Replace with `Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk"` |
| 2 | Explicit `Import` of Common.props/CSharp.targets | Handled by SDK automatically |
| 3 | `Configuration`/`Platform` conditional defaults | SDK provides these defaults |
| 4 | `ProjectGuid` | Not needed in SDK-style |
| 5 | `TargetFrameworkVersion v4.7.2` | Becomes `<TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>` |
| 6 | `FileAlignment`, `Deterministic` | SDK defaults |
| 7 | `AutoGenerateBindingRedirects` | SDK default for applicable projects |
| 8 | Debug/Release `PropertyGroup` blocks | SDK provides sensible defaults |
| 9 | Explicit `<Reference>` for System assemblies | Implicit with SDK-style |
| 10 | Explicit `<Compile Include="...">` items | SDK-style uses file globbing |
| 11 | `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` | Attributes auto-generated from csproj properties |
| 12 | `OutputType Library` | Default for SDK-style, can be omitted |
| 13 | `RootNamespace`/`AssemblyName` matching project name | Implicit, can be omitted |

Let me apply all of these now.

arguments.old_str:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Project ToolsVersion="15.0" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003">
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props" Condition="Exists('$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props')" />
  <PropertyGroup>
    <Configuration Condition=" '$(Configuration)' == '' ">Debug</Configuration>
    <Platform Condition=" '$(Platform)' == '' ">AnyCPU</Platform>
    <ProjectGuid>{12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012}</ProjectGuid>
    <OutputType>Library</OutputType>
    <RootNamespace>LegacyApp</RootNamespace>
    <AssemblyName>LegacyApp</AssemblyName>
    <TargetFrameworkVersion>v4.7.2</TargetFrameworkVersion>
    <FileAlignment>512</FileAlignment>
    <AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>true</AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>
    <Deterministic>true</Deterministic>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup Condition=" '$(Configuration)|$(Platform)' == 'Debug|AnyCPU' ">
    <DebugSymbols>true</DebugSymbols>
    <DebugType>full</DebugType>
    <Optimize>false</Optimize>
    <OutputPath>bin\Debug\</OutputPath>
    <DefineConstants>DEBUG;TRACE</DefineConstants>
    <ErrorReport>prompt</ErrorReport>
    <WarningLevel>4</WarningLevel>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup Condition=" '$(Configuration)|$(Platform)' == 'Release|AnyCPU' ">
    <DebugType>pdbonly</DebugType>
    <Optimize>true</Optimize>
    <OutputPath>bin\Release\</OutputPath>
    <DefineConstants>TRACE</DefineConstants>
    <ErrorReport>prompt</ErrorReport>
    <WarningLevel>4</WarningLevel>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Reference Include="System" />
    <Reference Include="System.Core" />
    <Reference Include="System.Data" />
    <Reference Include="System.Xml" />
    <Reference Include="System.Xml.Linq" />
    <Reference Include="Microsoft.CSharp" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Compile Include="Calculator.cs" />
    <Compile Include="StringHelper.cs" />
    <Compile Include="Properties\AssemblyInfo.cs" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildToolsPath)\Microsoft.CSharp.targets" />
</Project>
arguments.new_str:
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">

  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>
    <Description>A legacy-style project for modernization testing</Description>
    <Company>TestCo</Company>
    <Product>LegacyApp</Product>
    <Copyright>Copyright © 2024</Copyright>
    <Version>1.0.0.0</Version>
  </PropertyGroup>

</Project>

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Remove legacy AssemblyInfo.cs and Properties dir

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Remove legacy AssemblyInfo.cs and Properties dir

data.reasoningText:
Now I have a complete picture of the legacy project. Let me identify all the legacy patterns and modernize the project file.

Legacy patterns found:
1. **XML namespace and ToolsVersion** - `ToolsVersion="15.0"` and `xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003"` — SDK-style uses `<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">`
2. **Explicit MSBuild imports** - `Import Project="$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)..."` and `Import Project="$(MSBuildToolsPath)\Microsoft.CSharp.targets"` — handled by SDK


3. **Configuration/Platform defaults** - The conditional property groups for these are redundant since SDK provides sensible defaults
4. **ProjectGuid** - Not needed in SDK-style projects
5. **TargetFrameworkVersion v4.7.2** - Should become `TargetFramework` with `net472`
6. **FileAlignment and Deterministic** - Both are defaults in SDK-style, can be removed
7. **AutoGenerateBindingRedirects** - Default for certain project types in SDK-style
8. **Debug/Release property groups** - SDK provides sensible defaults for these configurations
9. **Explicit system references** - The hardcoded `System` and other framework references are implicit in SDK-style targeting .NET Framework
10. **Compile includes** - SDK-style uses globbing by default, so explicit file includes aren't necessary
11. **AssemblyInfo.cs** - SDK-style auto-generates assembly attributes, so I can move that metadata directly into csproj properties
12. **OutputType Library** - This is the default for SDK-style, can be omitted

Now I'm creating the modernized csproj...

Building the modernized project file...

Actually, I realize that since both RootNamespace and AssemblyName match the project file name, those can be implicit and removed. I should also delete the AssemblyInfo.cs file since the SDK-style project will auto-generate those attributes. Let me make these changes now.

data.content:
The project went from **47 lines → 12 lines**. Here's a summary of what changed:

**Removed (all handled by SDK defaults):**
- XML declaration, `ToolsVersion`, XML namespace
- Two `Import` statements (Common.props, CSharp.targets)
- `ProjectGuid`, `OutputType`, `RootNamespace`, `AssemblyName`
- `FileAlignment`, `AutoGenerateBindingRedirects`, `Deterministic`
- Entire Debug/Release `PropertyGroup` blocks (16 lines)
- All 6 explicit `<Reference>` entries for System assemblies
- All 3 explicit `<Compile Include>` entries (SDK uses file globbing)
- `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` (attributes now auto-generated from csproj)

**Kept as csproj properties:**
- `TargetFramework` (converted from `v4.7.2` → `net472`)
- Assembly metadata (`Description`, `Company`, `Product`, `Copyright`, `Version`) — migrated from `AssemblyInfo.cs`
